evals.prompt: My CSS transition on left: 0 to left: 300px is janky on mobile. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: Replace with transform: translateX(300px), explain compositor-only property

evals.prompt: I applied will-change: transform to all 200 cards. Is that fine?
evals.expected_output: Flags layer explosion risk, recommends removing will-change from static cards
assertions: Recommends targeted will-change only on animating element

evals.prompt: My chat message list with 1000 messages is slow to scroll. Optimize.
evals.expected_output: Recommends content-visibility: auto with contain-intrinsic-size on list items

evals.prompt: How do I prevent a complex widget from causing full-page layout recalculation?
evals.expected_output: Recommends contain: layout style paint or contain: strict on the widget

evals.prompt: Add a fade-in animation to modal, respecting reduced motion preference.
evals.expected_output: Uses opacity transition, wraps in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)

evals.prompt: Design a hero section for my SaaS homepage.
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT be the primary trigger — ui-ux-optimize handles design tasks
assertions: Does not over-apply render performance rules to a static design task

evals.prompt: Audit my CSS animations for performance issues.
evals.expected_output: Full audit using property cost table, checks transform/opacity usage, will-change budget
assertions: Checks for non-compositor properties in animations

evals.prompt: Set up a Postgres database schema for my app.
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger — backend task
assertions: CSS render performance rules not applied to database task
